parameters.content:
## Live Speech — START
Portal / relay calls **POST /webhook/talent/live-speech-start** with `session_id` + `email`.
Returns Gemini Live system prompt + session context.

Set **live_relay_url** in CFG to your WebSocket relay.

## Live Speech — COMPLETE
Relay posts **POST /webhook/talent/live-speech-complete** with `turns[]`, scores, optional `session_audio_url`.
PATCHes session → result mail if PASS/FAIL.

**Connect:** Disable old per-phase speech branch in Assessment workflow when using live mode.

parameters.url: ={{ $('CODE - Normalize Live Speech Complete').first().json.config.supabase_url }}/rest/v1/{{ $('CODE - Normalize Live Speech Complete').first().json.config.table_assessment_sessions || 'assessment_sessions' }}?id=eq.{{ encodeURIComponent($('CODE - Normalize Live Speech Complete').first().json.session_id) }}&select=*

nodes.name: CODE - Build Live Speech Relay Context

parameters.responseBody:
={{ {
  ok: true,
  session_id: $json.session_id,
  candidate_email: $json.candidate_email,
  system_instruction: $json.system_instruction,
  kickoff_prompt: $json.kickoff_prompt,
  gemini_live_model: $json.gemini_live_model,
  live_relay_url: $json.live_relay_url,
  live_complete_webhook: $json.live_complete_webhook,
  portal_base_url: $json.portal_base_url,
  live_save_url: $json.live_save_url,
  supabase_url: $json.supabase_url,
  supabase_key: $json.supabase_key,
  max_questions: $json.max_questions,
  speech_phases: $json.speech_phases,
  speech_answer_seconds: $json.speech_answer_seconds,
  current_phase: $json.current_phase,
  requisition_title: $json.requisition_title,
  assessment_mode: "live_speech",
  config: $json.config
} }}

main.node: CODE - Build Live Speech Relay Context
